problem:
The solution to the inequality
\[y = -x^2 + ax + b \le 0\]is $(-\infty,-3] \cup [5,\infty).$  Find the vertex of the parabola $y = -x^2 + ax + b.$

classified_questions.question: Can you describe the meaning of the provided solution to the inequality $y=-x^2+ax+b\leq0$?
